haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students discuss studying abroad and describe personal goals using present tenses.
Students use phrases for agreeing and disagreeing when discussing educational choices.
Students describe their neighborhood and environment using descriptive adjectives and prepositions.
Students discuss environmental problems and propose solutions using should/ought to.

haftalar.kazanim: E9.3.1 — Future tenses and career planning
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students use will and going to to describe future career and life plans.

haftalar.kazanim: E9.3.2 — Making predictions about the future
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students make predictions about future technology and society using future forms.

haftalar.kazanim: E9.4.1 — Discussing food and culinary traditions
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students compare traditional and modern food habits using comparative and superlative adjectives.

haftalar.kazanim: E9.4.2 — Expressing likes and dislikes with reasons
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students express food preferences and explain reasons using because/since/as.
Students discuss technological innovations and their impact using passive voice.
Students use first and second conditionals to discuss possible and hypothetical future events.

haftalar.kazanim: E9.6.1 — Writing persuasive texts and slogans
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students write persuasive campaign texts using imperatives and modal verbs.
Students discuss social campaigns and volunteer work using present perfect.

haftalar.kazanim: E9.7.1 — Describing historical and cultural sites
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students describe world heritage sites using passive voice and descriptive language.
Students use past simple and past perfect to report historical events.
Students write a short adventure story using narrative tenses and sequencing words.

haftalar.kazanim: E9.8.2 — Reading comprehension: identifying story elements
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students identify character, setting, conflict and resolution in an adventure text.
Students discuss the influence of TV and social media using reported speech.

haftalar.kazanim: E9.9.2 — Digital literacy and online safety
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students discuss online safety and responsible digital citizenship.
